title: Better Concrete Conversion
description: Converts concrete powder to concrete when it touches water in item form. Eliminates the need to place every concrete powder block you want to convert
body: Have you ever gotten tired of manually converting concrete powder one block at a time? Well this mod allows you to convert concrete powder items to concrete without ever placing a block! Simply toss your concrete powder into water one stack at a time and it will instantly be converted into concrete.
